Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-24-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS TRICO PIPES AND ARAM HODESS'S Motion To Amend Complaint.

Plaintiffs TRICO Pipes and Aram Hodess's motion to amend complaint is granted. Plaintiffs have dismissed judgment debtor Wayne Wong as a party defendant, and propose to amend their claims against defendant Winnie Wong. Their proposed claims against Ms. Wong do not appear to be barred by Mr. Wong's discharge or by the bankruptcy stay. In any event, Defendants may raise any challenge to the validity of the amended complaint by way of demurrer or motion for summary judgment.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)
